flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Community College of Aurora rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.9k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Community College of Aurora rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.4k → $17.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Community College of Aurora fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6k → 3.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Community College of Aurora fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
